description_long: This bar features a long, dark countertop with four matching stools arranged in front, all set on a wooden plank floor. Behind the counter is a tall wooden shelving unit stocked with glassware and bottles, giving the space a classic, inviting look. The shelving is divided into open compartments, some holding wine glasses and others displaying bottles, with a green bottle standing out among the collection. The bar counter is sleek and modern, contrasting with the rustic wood textures of the floor and shelving. To the side, a streetlamp is visible, suggesting an urban or sidewalk setting. The overall design blends modern bar elements with a touch of rustic charm, making it suitable for a cozy urban environment.
description: A modern bar with a dark counter, four stools, and a tall wooden shelving unit stocked with glassware and bottles, set on a rustic wooden floor.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bar counter, four stools, wooden shelving with glassware and bottles, and a streetlamp to the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the bar counter, the arrangement of stools, and the depth of the shelving unit.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the wooden floor, the rectangular shape of the bar, and the shelving unit's surface.
description_view_3: Angled rear view showing the back of the shelving unit, the bar counter, stools, and the streetlamp's proximity.
